title: Audible Mace
description: Adds diverse Sounds to the Mace
body: Audible Mace adds custom sound effects to the Mace in Minecraft. You can choose between multiple sound variations and customize how your Mace sounds when used. ## 🔊 Available Sounds - [Default](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hGtCEv4rAPM) (I mean it is already in the game) - [Faah](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-BqVKDB9sDw) - [Vine Boom](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6yrdS4tIP9U) - [Bonk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6TP0abZdRXg) You can select your preferred sound inside the Respackopts menu. I am working on more sounds to add in the Future, so stay tuned :3 ## 📦 Requirements Minecraft 1.20 – 1.21.11 Respackopts (Required!) ## _This pack will NOT work without Respackopts installed!_
